inputs.label: standard
inputs.project: DEADLINES — a podcast and newsletter about the working lives of journalists, covering the economics, psychology, and daily reality of newsroom work
inputs.personality: Frank, sometimes funny, never cynical. Respects the work even while criticizing the industry.
inputs.audience: Working journalists and media students aged 22-40
inputs.references_approach: Columbia Journalism Review's editorial register, the photography of Philip Montgomery, the design sensibility of The Atavist
inputs.references_avoid: Corporate media branding, LinkedIn thought-leader aesthetics, generic 'news' imagery

inputs.label: minimal
inputs.project: A YouTube channel about data visualization and information design

inputs.label: european
inputs.project: MERIDIAN — a documentary series about the cultural and economic life of the Mediterranean coast, from Tangier to Istanbul. Not travel content — investigative and cultural journalism about a region in transition.
inputs.personality: Intelligent, visually rich, politically aware without being polemical. Looks at the Mediterranean the way a resident does, not a tourist.
inputs.references_approach: Magnum Photos' Mediterranean work, the editorial design of Monocle (early era), the cinematography of Nuri Bilge Ceylan
inputs.references_avoid: Travel brochure imagery, Condé Nast Traveller aesthetics, blue-and-white generic Mediterranean
inputs.platforms: Documentary (broadcast and streaming), podcast, newsletter, Instagram, festival materials
